text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At long last, it's time for Taiki Shuttle's debut
race.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaw! Can't believe I'm debuting today!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's been a long time comin'—ever since the
moment I set foot in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: And to top it off, I've got me a new dream!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I wanna be Umamusume of the Year! You best
believe I'll be puttin' in the work to make that
happen!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: You bet! I'll tear up the track and rise to the top!
